title: <div>When I was consoling you, you latched on to me so intensely and tightly, yo
content:
When I was consoling you, you latched on to me so intensely and tightly, you said, "This feels so good" (about 100x), "you smell really nice," "It suddenly doesn't feel so sad and lonely," and, "I could forget about someone like this." And I definitely agreed.

You went from hysterical crying to being upbeat, playful, and even cheery and hopeful.

You kissed me, and we kissed really intensely and passionately for a while, and you told me I was 1 of 3 guys you ever kissed. You said, "I didn't want to kiss those other 2, but something about you." And as you were putting your tongue down my throat, you were moving my hand down into your pants.

You held my hand and suddenly demanded the lights be turned on and studied my face for 15 minutes, and we complimented each other on how beautiful we found each other, what particular features, how good it felt to be so close, and how much we enjoyed kissing one another.

You asked me not to take you home, to keep you with me, and you were the first person I risked taking into my family's apartment to sleep with me because being close to you felt healing to me. At that point, you literally attempted to crawl under my skin, and you held onto me all night like no one else had before. I felt at peace for the first time in months and had such a sound sleep.
context: From document: Hey, good luck tonight. Be safe. It hurts me to see you so upset, and… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/3)
